description: List properties and responses of structural element links in the range.

6.0.description: List values and information about link objects in the range.

keywords.name: attach
keywords.description: attachment conditions

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: relative displacement in each degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: force
keywords.description: force being exerted in each degree-of-freedom

keywords.name: property
keywords.description: list link property associated with the current model. The value of s corresponds to the desired property. [DR: help to sort out what to do with next statement] See:flag2:-Link to discussion of the link force-displacement models available here- for a list of properties associated with each of the deformable models available.

keywords.name: slide
keywords.description: sliding flag

keywords.name: slide-tolerance
keywords.description: sliding tolerance

keywords.name: source-node
keywords.description: source node — node from which the link emanates

keywords.name: state
keywords.description: the failure state associated with each degree-of-freedom that has a deformable force-displacement model

keywords.name: target
keywords.description: link type: node-to-zone or node-to-node and the component-id of the specific target of this link

keywords.name: slide
keywords.description: sliding flag

keywords.name: slide-tolerance
keywords.description: sliding tolerance

keywords.name: source-node
keywords.description: source node — node from which the link emanates

keywords.name: state

keywords.name: attach
keywords.description: attachment conditions

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: displacement in deformable models of this link. Displacement of target object minum displacement of source node (node-local coordinate system).

keywords.name: force
keywords.description: Force in deformable models of this link (sign corresponds with sign of displacement)

keywords.name: property
keywords.description: value of property s in deformable models of this link (see Link Model Properties )

keywords.name: slide
keywords.description: flag for large-strain sliding

keywords.name: slide-tolerance
keywords.description: sliding tolerance (used during large-strain sliding)

keywords.name: source-node
keywords.description: node from which the link emanates

keywords.name: state
keywords.description: yield state for each degree-of-freedom that has a deformable model

keywords.name: target
keywords.description: type (node-to-node or node-to-object) and ID (or component-id of a node) of the link target
